description_long: This is a large, rectangular, open-shelved cabinet or storage unit with a modern, industrial design. The structure consists of two thick, vertical columns on either side, connected by horizontal shelves, creating a deep, open compartment in the center. The sides and back appear to be made of a translucent or frosted material, possibly acrylic or glass, while the main frame and shelves are solid and opaque, likely metal or painted wood. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, providing additional support or display space. The open design allows for easy access from the front, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in public or semi-public urban environments. The overall appearance is minimalist, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements.
description: A large, open, rectangular cabinet with thick vertical columns, translucent sides, and solid horizontal shelves, designed for accessible storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open central compartment framed by two thick vertical columns and a horizontal shelf at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet, the two parallel columns, and the open space between them.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the open compartment and visible shelf structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the parallel columns and the open central area from the other side.
